category_sources: source_facts.description: C library for selecting an OpenGL API and window system at runtime; official Waffle homepage describes the same graphics/runtime-selection role.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: waffle; official homepage title uses Waffle.
docs_sources: Official Waffle homepage lists Documentation links; official features page documents supported OpenGL platforms and APIs.
repo_sources: Official Waffle homepage lists the source repository as gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/waffle.git; source_facts.repo is empty so repo was determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names OpenGL API/window-system runtime selection; official features page documents OpenGL, OpenGL ES, EGL, Wayland, X11, GLX, GBM, and WGL support.
